## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore

## Validation

- [ ] Backend tests passed (`cd invoice-backend && ./mvnw test`)
- [ ] Frontend lint passed (`cd invoice-frontend && npm run lint`)
- [ ] Frontend build passed (`cd invoice-frontend && npm run build`)

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change scoped and reviewable.
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed.
- [ ] I avoided introducing hard-coded credentials.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate.

## Screenshots / API examples (if applicable)

Add screenshots or request/response samples here.
